package rulecoverage

func NegativeSortOrFilterWhitelistLogicDuplicatedAcrossHandlers() string {
    ruleID := "sort_or_filter_whitelist_logic_duplicated_across_handlers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repeated client-field whitelist logic across endpoints."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
